questions.imageDesc: A woman is sitting at a desk, typing on a laptop while holding a cup of coffee.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: She is typing on a laptop.
questions.explanation: The woman is typing on a laptop, which matches option A.
questions.explanationVi: Người phụ nữ đang gõ máy tính xách tay, khớp với đáp án A.

questions.imageDesc: Two men in hard hats are standing near a construction site, looking at a blueprint together.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: The men are painting a wall.
The men are examining a document together.
The men are loading a truck.
The men are having lunch outdoors.
questions.explanation: The two men are looking at a blueprint (a document) together, matching option B.
questions.explanationVi: Hai người đàn ông đang cùng xem một bản vẽ (tài liệu), khớp với đáp án B.

questions.imageDesc: Several passengers are boarding a bus at a covered bus stop while it is raining.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: The passengers are waiting in a boarding line.
The bus driver is repairing the vehicle.
The passengers are getting on a bus in the rain.
The bus stop is completely empty.
questions.explanation: The picture shows passengers boarding a bus while it rains, matching option C.
questions.explanationVi: Bức tranh cho thấy hành khách đang lên xe buýt trong lúc trời mưa, khớp với đáp án C.

questions.imageDesc: A shelf in a supermarket is being restocked by an employee arranging cans in neat rows.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: The shelf has been completely emptied.
A customer is pushing a shopping cart.
An employee is arranging items on a shelf.
The store is closed for the day.
questions.explanation: An employee is restocking and arranging cans on the shelf, matching option C.
questions.explanationVi: Một nhân viên đang sắp xếp các lon hàng lên kệ, khớp với đáp án C.

questions.imageDesc: A chef in a white uniform is chopping vegetables on a cutting board in a restaurant kitchen.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: The chef is washing dishes in the sink.
The chef is serving food to customers.
questions.explanation: The chef is described as chopping vegetables, matching option B.
questions.explanationVi: Đầu bếp đang thái rau, khớp với đáp án B.

questions.imageDesc: A librarian is pushing a cart of books between tall bookshelves in a quiet library.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: The librarian is closing the library.
The librarian is pushing a cart of books.
Visitors are reading at a table.
questions.explanation: The picture shows the librarian pushing a book cart, matching option C.
questions.explanationVi: Bức tranh cho thấy thủ thư đang đẩy xe chở sách, khớp với đáp án C.

questions.imageDesc: A mechanic is leaning over the open hood of a car, examining the engine with a flashlight.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: The mechanic is washing the car.
The mechanic is examining the engine.
The mechanic is changing a tire.
questions.explanation: The mechanic is examining the engine under the open hood, matching option C.
questions.explanationVi: Người thợ máy đang kiểm tra động cơ dưới nắp capo đang mở, khớp với đáp án C.

questions.imageDesc: Two colleagues are shaking hands in an office lobby while one of them holds out a business card.
questions.question: Listen to the four statements and choose the one that best describes the picture.
options: They are arguing with each other.
They are shaking hands and exchanging a business card.
They are sitting down for lunch.
They are leaving the building separately.
questions.explanation: The colleagues are shaking hands while exchanging a business card, matching option B.
questions.explanationVi: Hai đồng nghiệp đang bắt tay và trao danh thiếp, khớp với đáp án B.

questions.audioScript: Where is the nearest post office?
questions.question: Where is the nearest post office?
options: It's just around the corner, next to the bank.
questions.explanation: This is a "Where" question asking for a location; only option A gives a location.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi "Where" hỏi về địa điểm; chỉ đáp án A đưa ra một địa điểm cụ thể.

questions.audioScript: Could you send me the sales report by Friday?
questions.question: Could you send me the sales report by Friday?
options: Sure, I'll email it to you this afternoon.
questions.explanation: This is a request; option A directly agrees to the request.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu yêu cầu; đáp án A đồng ý trực tiếp với yêu cầu đó.

questions.audioScript: Who's in charge of the marketing campaign this quarter?
questions.question: Who's in charge of the marketing campaign this quarter?
questions.explanation: This is a "Who" question; only option B names a person.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi "Who" hỏi về người; chỉ đáp án B nêu tên một người cụ thể.

questions.audioScript: Isn't the conference room already booked for 3 p.m.?
questions.question: Isn't the conference room already booked for 3 p.m.?
options: The room is on the second floor.
questions.explanation: This is a negative question about availability; option A directly answers with availability information.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi phủ định về việc phòng có trống hay không; đáp án A trả lời trực tiếp về tình trạng phòng.

questions.audioScript: Would you like tea or coffee?
questions.question: Would you like tea or coffee?
options: I bought it at the supermarket.
questions.explanation: This is an "or" choice question; option A picks one of the two choices, which is the natural response.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi lựa chọn "or"; đáp án A chọn một trong hai lựa chọn, là phản hồi tự nhiên nhất.

questions.audioScript: How long will the training session take?
questions.question: How long will the training session take?
questions.explanation: This is a "How long" question asking about duration; only option B gives a duration.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi "How long" hỏi về thời lượng; chỉ đáp án B nêu một khoảng thời gian.

questions.audioScript: When does the flight to Tokyo depart?
questions.question: When does the flight to Tokyo depart?
options: It leaves at 6:45 in the morning.
questions.explanation: This is a "When" question asking about time; only option B gives a time.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi "When" hỏi về thời gian; chỉ đáp án B nêu một mốc thời gian cụ thể.

questions.audioScript: Have you finished reviewing the contract yet?
questions.question: Have you finished reviewing the contract yet?
options: Not yet, I'll be done by noon.
questions.explanation: This asks about completion status; option A directly answers with a status update.
questions.explanationVi: Câu hỏi về tiến độ hoàn thành; đáp án A trả lời trực tiếp về tình trạng công việc.

questions.audioScript: Why was the shipment delayed?
questions.question: Why was the shipment delayed?
options: There was a problem at customs.
questions.explanation: This is a "Why" question; only option B gives a reason for the delay.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi "Why" hỏi về lý do; chỉ đáp án B nêu nguyên nhân của sự chậm trễ.

questions.audioScript: Should I forward this email to the whole team?
questions.question: Should I forward this email to the whole team?
options: Yes, please, they all need to see it.
questions.explanation: This is a yes/no suggestion question; option A gives a direct yes answer with a reason.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi đề nghị dạng có/không; đáp án A trả lời "có" trực tiếp kèm lý do.

questions.audioScript: Which printer is out of toner?
questions.question: Which printer is out of toner?
options: The one near the break room.
questions.explanation: This is a "Which" question asking to identify a specific printer; only option A identifies one.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi "Which" yêu cầu xác định máy in cụ thể; chỉ đáp án A chỉ ra máy in đó.

questions.audioScript: Is the Wi-Fi password the same as last time?
questions.question: Is the Wi-Fi password the same as last time?
options: No, it was changed last week.
The signal is quite strong here.
questions.explanation: This is a yes/no question about whether something changed; option A answers directly.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu hỏi có/không về việc có thay đổi hay không; đáp án A trả lời trực tiếp.

questions.audioScript:
Man: Hi, I'm calling about the printer in the second-floor office. It's been jamming all morning.
Woman: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me the model number? I'll send a technician right away.
Man: I don't have it in front of me, but it's the one near the accounting department. Could someone come by this afternoon?
Woman: Of course. I'll schedule a visit for 2 p.m. today.
questions.question: Why is the man calling?
questions.explanation: The man says the printer "has been jamming all morning", so he is reporting a problem.
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông nói máy in "bị kẹt giấy suốt cả buổi sáng", nên anh ấy đang báo cáo sự cố.

questions.audioScript:
Man: Hi, I'm calling about the printer in the second-floor office. It's been jamming all morning.
Woman: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me the model number? I'll send a technician right away.
Man: I don't have it in front of me, but it's the one near the accounting department. Could someone come by this afternoon?
Woman: Of course. I'll schedule a visit for 2 p.m. today.
questions.question: Where is the printer located?
questions.explanation: The man says the printer is "the one near the accounting department".
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông nói máy in là "cái gần phòng kế toán".

questions.audioScript:
Man: Hi, I'm calling about the printer in the second-floor office. It's been jamming all morning.
Woman: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me the model number? I'll send a technician right away.
Man: I don't have it in front of me, but it's the one near the accounting department. Could someone come by this afternoon?
Woman: Of course. I'll schedule a visit for 2 p.m. today.
questions.question: What will the woman most likely do next?
options: Transfer the call to another department
questions.explanation: The woman says "I'll schedule a visit for 2 p.m. today".
questions.explanationVi: Người phụ nữ nói "Tôi sẽ sắp xếp lịch đến vào 2 giờ chiều nay".

questions.audioScript:
Woman: Did you get a chance to look over the budget proposal I sent yesterday?
Man: Yes, it looks solid overall, but I think the marketing line is a bit too high.
Woman: I was thinking the same thing. Should we cut it by ten percent?
Man: That sounds reasonable. Let's discuss it more at tomorrow's meeting.
questions.question: What are the speakers mainly discussing?
questions.explanation: The woman refers to "the budget proposal I sent yesterday".
questions.explanationVi: Người phụ nữ nhắc đến "đề xuất ngân sách tôi đã gửi hôm qua".

questions.audioScript:
Woman: Did you get a chance to look over the budget proposal I sent yesterday?
Man: Yes, it looks solid overall, but I think the marketing line is a bit too high.
Woman: I was thinking the same thing. Should we cut it by ten percent?
Man: That sounds reasonable. Let's discuss it more at tomorrow's meeting.
questions.question: What does the man think about the marketing budget?
options: It has not been decided yet
questions.explanation: The man says "the marketing line is a bit too high".
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông nói "khoản mục marketing hơi cao".

questions.audioScript:
Woman: Did you get a chance to look over the budget proposal I sent yesterday?
Man: Yes, it looks solid overall, but I think the marketing line is a bit too high.
Woman: I was thinking the same thing. Should we cut it by ten percent?
Man: That sounds reasonable. Let's discuss it more at tomorrow's meeting.
questions.question: What will the speakers most likely do tomorrow?
questions.explanation: The man says "Let's discuss it more at tomorrow's meeting".
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông nói "Hãy bàn thêm ở cuộc họp ngày mai".

questions.audioScript:
Woman: Hi, I have a reservation under the name Tran for two nights.
Man: Let me check... I'm sorry, I only see a reservation for one night in our system.
Woman: That's strange, I booked online and paid for two nights already.
Man: No problem, I'll fix it right now and send you a confirmation email.
questions.question: What problem does the woman report?
options: Her reservation shows the wrong number of nights
questions.explanation: The man's system only shows one night, but the woman booked two nights.
questions.explanationVi: Hệ thống của người đàn ông chỉ hiển thị một đêm, trong khi người phụ nữ đã đặt hai đêm.

questions.audioScript:
Woman: Hi, I have a reservation under the name Tran for two nights.
Man: Let me check... I'm sorry, I only see a reservation for one night in our system.
Woman: That's strange, I booked online and paid for two nights already.
Man: No problem, I'll fix it right now and send you a confirmation email.
questions.question: How did the woman make her reservation?
questions.explanation: The woman says "I booked online and paid for two nights already".
questions.explanationVi: Người phụ nữ nói "Tôi đã đặt online và thanh toán cho hai đêm rồi".

questions.audioScript:
Woman: Hi, I have a reservation under the name Tran for two nights.
Man: Let me check... I'm sorry, I only see a reservation for one night in our system.
Woman: That's strange, I booked online and paid for two nights already.
Man: No problem, I'll fix it right now and send you a confirmation email.
questions.question: What will the man do next?
options: Correct the reservation and send a confirmation
Ask the woman to pay again
Transfer the call to a manager
questions.explanation: The man says "I'll fix it right now and send you a confirmation email".
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông nói "Tôi sẽ sửa ngay và gửi email xác nhận cho bạn".

questions.audioScript:
Man: Thanks for coming in. Are you available for a second interview next Wednesday afternoon?
Woman: Yes, I'm free after 2 p.m. that day.
Man: Great, let's set it for 3 p.m. You'll meet with our design director this time.
Woman: Sounds good. Should I bring my portfolio again?
Man: Yes, please bring an updated version if you have one.
questions.question: What is being scheduled?
questions.explanation: The man asks if she is available for "a second interview next Wednesday afternoon".
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông hỏi cô ấy có rảnh cho "buổi phỏng vấn lần hai vào chiều thứ Tư tới" không.

questions.audioScript:
Man: Thanks for coming in. Are you available for a second interview next Wednesday afternoon?
Woman: Yes, I'm free after 2 p.m. that day.
Man: Great, let's set it for 3 p.m. You'll meet with our design director this time.
Woman: Sounds good. Should I bring my portfolio again?
Man: Yes, please bring an updated version if you have one.
questions.question: Who will the woman meet with next?
questions.explanation: The man says "You'll meet with our design director this time".
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông nói "Lần này bạn sẽ gặp giám đốc thiết kế của chúng tôi".

questions.audioScript:
Man: Thanks for coming in. Are you available for a second interview next Wednesday afternoon?
Woman: Yes, I'm free after 2 p.m. that day.
Man: Great, let's set it for 3 p.m. You'll meet with our design director this time.
Woman: Sounds good. Should I bring my portfolio again?
Man: Yes, please bring an updated version if you have one.
questions.question: What does the man ask the woman to bring?
questions.explanation: The man asks her to "bring an updated version" of her portfolio.
questions.explanationVi: Người đàn ông yêu cầu cô ấy "mang theo phiên bản cập nhật" của portfolio.

questions.audioScript: Attention, shoppers. Greenfield Supermarket will be closing one hour early today, at 8 p.m., for annual inventory. We apologize for any inconvenience. All checkout lanes will remain open until closing time, so please complete your shopping soon. Thank you for shopping with us.
questions.question: What is the announcement mainly about?
options: A change in store hours permanently
questions.explanation: The announcement says the store "will be closing one hour early today".
questions.explanationVi: Thông báo nói cửa hàng "sẽ đóng cửa sớm một tiếng hôm nay".

questions.audioScript: Attention, shoppers. Greenfield Supermarket will be closing one hour early today, at 8 p.m., for annual inventory. We apologize for any inconvenience. All checkout lanes will remain open until closing time, so please complete your shopping soon. Thank you for shopping with us.
questions.question: Why is the store closing early?
questions.explanation: The announcement gives the reason as "for annual inventory".
questions.explanationVi: Thông báo nêu lý do là "để kiểm kê hàng năm".

questions.audioScript: Attention, shoppers. Greenfield Supermarket will be closing one hour early today, at 8 p.m., for annual inventory. We apologize for any inconvenience. All checkout lanes will remain open until closing time, so please complete your shopping soon. Thank you for shopping with us.
questions.question: What are shoppers asked to do?
questions.explanation: The announcement asks shoppers to "complete your shopping soon".
questions.explanationVi: Thông báo yêu cầu khách hàng "hoàn tất việc mua sắm sớm".

questions.audioScript: Good morning, everyone. Before we start today's meeting, I'd like to remind you that the new expense reporting system goes live next Monday. All employees must submit receipts through the app instead of paper forms starting then. IT will hold a short training session this Thursday at 10 a.m. in Room 204 for anyone who needs help.
questions.question: What is the speaker mainly announcing?
questions.explanation: The speaker announces that "the new expense reporting system goes live next Monday".
questions.explanationVi: Người nói thông báo rằng "hệ thống báo cáo chi phí mới sẽ chính thức hoạt động vào thứ Hai tới".

questions.audioScript: Good morning, everyone. Before we start today's meeting, I'd like to remind you that the new expense reporting system goes live next Monday. All employees must submit receipts through the app instead of paper forms starting then. IT will hold a short training session this Thursday at 10 a.m. in Room 204 for anyone who needs help.
questions.question: What must employees do starting next Monday?
questions.explanation: Employees must "submit receipts through the app instead of paper forms".
questions.explanationVi: Nhân viên phải "nộp hóa đơn qua ứng dụng thay vì mẫu giấy".

questions.audioScript: Good morning, everyone. Before we start today's meeting, I'd like to remind you that the new expense reporting system goes live next Monday. All employees must submit receipts through the app instead of paper forms starting then. IT will hold a short training session this Thursday at 10 a.m. in Room 204 for anyone who needs help.
questions.question: When is the training session?
questions.explanation: The training session is held "this Thursday at 10 a.m.".
questions.explanationVi: Buổi tập huấn diễn ra "thứ Năm này lúc 10 giờ sáng".

questions.audioScript: This is a traffic update for the downtown area. There is heavy congestion on Main Street due to ongoing road repairs near the river bridge. Drivers heading to the business district should use Second Avenue as an alternative route. The repair work is expected to continue through Friday.
questions.question: What is causing the traffic congestion?
questions.explanation: The talk mentions "ongoing road repairs near the river bridge" as the cause.
questions.explanationVi: Bản tin nhắc đến "công trình sửa đường gần cầu sông" là nguyên nhân.

questions.audioScript: This is a traffic update for the downtown area. There is heavy congestion on Main Street due to ongoing road repairs near the river bridge. Drivers heading to the business district should use Second Avenue as an alternative route. The repair work is expected to continue through Friday.
questions.question: What are drivers advised to do?
questions.explanation: The talk advises drivers to "use Second Avenue as an alternative route".
questions.explanationVi: Bản tin khuyên tài xế "dùng đường Second Avenue làm lộ trình thay thế".

questions.audioScript: This is a traffic update for the downtown area. There is heavy congestion on Main Street due to ongoing road repairs near the river bridge. Drivers heading to the business district should use Second Avenue as an alternative route. The repair work is expected to continue through Friday.
questions.question: How long will the repair work continue?
questions.explanation: The talk says the repair work "is expected to continue through Friday".
questions.explanationVi: Bản tin nói công trình sửa chữa "dự kiến kéo dài đến hết thứ Sáu".

questions.audioScript: Welcome to Fit Life Gym. Please note that our 6 p.m. yoga class has been moved to Studio B for this week only, due to floor maintenance in Studio A. All other classes will run as usual. Members can check the updated schedule on our mobile app or at the front desk.
questions.question: What is the announcement mainly about?
questions.explanation: The announcement is about the yoga class being "moved to Studio B for this week only".
questions.explanationVi: Thông báo nói về việc lớp yoga "được chuyển sang Studio B chỉ trong tuần này".

questions.audioScript: Welcome to Fit Life Gym. Please note that our 6 p.m. yoga class has been moved to Studio B for this week only, due to floor maintenance in Studio A. All other classes will run as usual. Members can check the updated schedule on our mobile app or at the front desk.
questions.question: Why was the class moved?
questions.explanation: The reason given is "due to floor maintenance in Studio A".
questions.explanationVi: Lý do được nêu là "do bảo trì sàn ở Studio A".

questions.audioScript: Welcome to Fit Life Gym. Please note that our 6 p.m. yoga class has been moved to Studio B for this week only, due to floor maintenance in Studio A. All other classes will run as usual. Members can check the updated schedule on our mobile app or at the front desk.
questions.question: Where can members find the updated schedule?
options: On the mobile app or at the front desk
On the parking lot bulletin board
questions.explanation: Members can check the schedule "on our mobile app or at the front desk".
questions.explanationVi: Hội viên có thể xem lịch "trên ứng dụng di động hoặc tại quầy lễ tân".

questions.question: The new marketing manager will begin work ____ March 1.
questions.explanation: Use "on" with specific dates.
questions.explanationVi: Dùng giới từ "on" với ngày cụ thể.

questions.question: All employees ____ to complete the safety training by the end of the month.
questions.explanation: The passive form "are required" fits the subject "employees" and the infinitive "to complete".
questions.explanationVi: Thể bị động "are required" phù hợp với chủ ngữ "employees" và động từ nguyên mẫu có to "to complete".

questions.question: Please submit your report ____ than Friday afternoon.
questions.explanation: "No later than" is a fixed expression meaning "by this time at the latest".
questions.explanationVi: "No later than" là cụm cố định nghĩa là "chậm nhất là vào lúc này".

questions.question: The conference room is currently ____ for a client meeting.
questions.explanation: "Occupied" (past participle as adjective) describes the state of the room after "is".
questions.explanationVi: "Occupied" (tính từ dạng phân từ 2) mô tả trạng thái của căn phòng sau động từ "is".

questions.question: ____ the heavy rain, the outdoor event proceeded as scheduled.
questions.explanation: "Despite" is followed by a noun phrase ("the heavy rain"), unlike "Although" which needs a clause.
questions.explanationVi: "Despite" theo sau là cụm danh từ ("the heavy rain"), khác với "Although" cần một mệnh đề.

questions.question: Ms. Patel has worked at this company ____ 2019.
questions.explanation: "Since" is used with a specific starting point in time in the present perfect tense.
questions.explanationVi: "Since" dùng với một mốc thời gian bắt đầu cụ thể trong thì hiện tại hoàn thành.

questions.question: The company's revenue grew ____ over the past three years.
questions.explanation: An adverb ("significantly") is needed to modify the verb "grew".
questions.explanationVi: Cần một trạng từ ("significantly") để bổ nghĩa cho động từ "grew".

questions.question: Neither the manager ____ the assistant was available to answer the call.
questions.explanation: "Neither... nor..." is the correct correlative conjunction pair.
questions.explanationVi: "Neither... nor..." là cặp liên từ tương quan chính xác.

questions.question: This model is more energy-efficient than ____ we used last year.
questions.explanation: "The one" replaces a specific singular noun already mentioned (the previous model).
questions.explanationVi: "The one" thay thế cho một danh từ số ít cụ thể đã được nhắc đến (mẫu trước đó).

questions.question: The technician ____ the printer before the meeting started.
questions.explanation: Past perfect ("had fixed") shows an action completed before another past action ("the meeting started").
questions.explanationVi: Thì quá khứ hoàn thành ("had fixed") diễn tả hành động hoàn tất trước một hành động khác trong quá khứ ("the meeting started").

questions.question: The committee members ____ the proposal will meet again on Thursday.
questions.explanation: A relative clause "who reviewed the proposal" is needed to modify "the committee members".
questions.explanationVi: Cần mệnh đề quan hệ "who reviewed the proposal" để bổ nghĩa cho "the committee members".

questions.question: This year's profits were much ____ than last year's.
questions.explanation: The comparative form "higher" is needed before "than".
questions.explanationVi: Cần dạng so sánh hơn "higher" trước "than".

questions.question: The manager avoided ____ a decision until all data was collected.
questions.explanation: The verb "avoid" is followed by a gerund ("making"), not an infinitive.
questions.explanationVi: Động từ "avoid" theo sau là danh động từ (gerund) "making", không dùng động từ nguyên mẫu có to.

questions.question: The new policy will apply to all departments ____ Human Resources.
questions.explanation: "Except for" is used to exclude something from a general statement.
questions.explanationVi: "Except for" dùng để loại trừ một trường hợp khỏi một phát biểu chung.

questions.question: If the shipment ____ on time, we would not have lost the client.
questions.explanation: This is a third conditional ("if... had arrived, ... would not have lost") about a hypothetical past situation.
questions.explanationVi: Đây là câu điều kiện loại 3 ("if... had arrived, ... would not have lost") diễn tả tình huống giả định trong quá khứ.

questions.question: There isn't ____ paper left in the printer tray.
questions.explanation: "Much" is used with uncountable nouns like "paper" in negative sentences.
questions.explanationVi: "Much" dùng với danh từ không đếm được như "paper" trong câu phủ định.

questions.question: The annual report ____ by the finance team every January.
questions.explanation: Passive voice ("is prepared") is needed since the report doesn't prepare itself.
questions.explanationVi: Cần thể bị động ("is prepared") vì bản báo cáo không tự chuẩn bị.

questions.question: ____ with the results, the director approved the next phase of the project.
questions.explanation: A past participle clause ("Satisfied with...") describes the director's state, similar to "Being satisfied".
questions.explanationVi: Mệnh đề rút gọn với phân từ 2 ("Satisfied with...") mô tả trạng thái của giám đốc.

questions.question: Each of the applicants ____ required to complete an online assessment.
questions.explanation: "Each of" takes a singular verb ("is"), even though "applicants" is plural.
questions.explanationVi: "Each of" luôn đi với động từ số ít ("is"), dù "applicants" là danh từ số nhiều.

questions.question: Please review the attached file ____ signing the agreement.
questions.explanation: "Prior to" is a formal preposition meaning "before", followed by a gerund ("signing").
questions.explanationVi: "Prior to" là giới từ trang trọng nghĩa "trước khi", theo sau là danh động từ ("signing").

passages.label: Memo
passages.text:
To: All Staff
From: Facilities Department
Subject: Office Renovation

We are pleased to announce that the third-floor office renovation will begin next week. During this period, employees on that floor will be temporarily (1)____ to desks on the fifth floor. The renovation is expected to improve lighting and (2)____ new, more comfortable furniture. We apologize for any (3)____ this may cause. (4)____

Thank you for your patience during this process.

questions.explanation: "Will be temporarily relocated" is passive voice, requiring the past participle "relocated".
questions.explanationVi: "Will be temporarily relocated" là thể bị động, cần dùng phân từ 2 "relocated".

passages.label: Memo
passages.text:
To: All Staff
From: Facilities Department
Subject: Office Renovation

We are pleased to announce that the third-floor office renovation will begin next week. During this period, employees on that floor will be temporarily (1)____ to desks on the fifth floor. The renovation is expected to improve lighting and (2)____ new, more comfortable furniture. We apologize for any (3)____ this may cause. (4)____

Thank you for your patience during this process.

questions.explanation: "Is expected to improve... and introduce" — parallel base-verb form after "to".
questions.explanationVi: "Is expected to improve... and introduce" — dùng động từ nguyên mẫu song song sau "to".

passages.label: Memo
passages.text:
To: All Staff
From: Facilities Department
Subject: Office Renovation

We are pleased to announce that the third-floor office renovation will begin next week. During this period, employees on that floor will be temporarily (1)____ to desks on the fifth floor. The renovation is expected to improve lighting and (2)____ new, more comfortable furniture. We apologize for any (3)____ this may cause. (4)____

Thank you for your patience during this process.

questions.explanation: "Apologize for any inconvenience" is a common fixed business expression.
questions.explanationVi: "Apologize for any inconvenience" là cụm diễn đạt cố định thường dùng trong văn phong công sở.

passages.label: Memo
passages.text:
To: All Staff
From: Facilities Department
Subject: Office Renovation

We are pleased to announce that the third-floor office renovation will begin next week. During this period, employees on that floor will be temporarily (1)____ to desks on the fifth floor. The renovation is expected to improve lighting and (2)____ new, more comfortable furniture. We apologize for any (3)____ this may cause. (4)____

Thank you for your patience during this process.

questions.question: (4) Which sentence best fits this blank?
options: The cafeteria will be closed on weekends.
The project is scheduled to finish within two weeks.
Please remember to submit your timesheet by Friday.
Our company was founded over twenty years ago.
questions.explanation: This sentence-insertion blank needs a sentence that logically continues the topic of the renovation timeline.
questions.explanationVi: Chỗ trống dạng chèn câu này cần một câu tiếp nối hợp lý với chủ đề thời gian thi công.

passages.label: Email
passages.text:
Subject: Introducing the SmartBrew Coffee Maker

Dear Valued Customer,

We are excited to (1)____ our newest product, the SmartBrew Coffee Maker. It connects to your phone, (2)____ you to schedule brewing times remotely. For a limited time, customers who order (3)____ May 31 will receive a free set of ceramic mugs. (4)____

Visit our website to place your order today.

questions.explanation: After "excited to", a base-verb infinitive ("introduce") is required.
questions.explanationVi: Sau "excited to" cần động từ nguyên mẫu ("introduce").

passages.label: Email
passages.text:
Subject: Introducing the SmartBrew Coffee Maker

Dear Valued Customer,

We are excited to (1)____ our newest product, the SmartBrew Coffee Maker. It connects to your phone, (2)____ you to schedule brewing times remotely. For a limited time, customers who order (3)____ May 31 will receive a free set of ceramic mugs. (4)____

Visit our website to place your order today.

questions.explanation: "Allowing you to..." is a participle clause describing the result of connecting to the phone.
questions.explanationVi: "Allowing you to..." là mệnh đề phân từ diễn tả kết quả của việc kết nối với điện thoại.

passages.label: Email
passages.text:
Subject: Introducing the SmartBrew Coffee Maker

Dear Valued Customer,

We are excited to (1)____ our newest product, the SmartBrew Coffee Maker. It connects to your phone, (2)____ you to schedule brewing times remotely. For a limited time, customers who order (3)____ May 31 will receive a free set of ceramic mugs. (4)____

Visit our website to place your order today.

questions.explanation: "By May 31" means "no later than that date", the correct deadline preposition here.
questions.explanationVi: "By May 31" nghĩa là "chậm nhất vào ngày đó", đúng giới từ chỉ hạn chót.

passages.label: Email
passages.text:
Subject: Introducing the SmartBrew Coffee Maker

Dear Valued Customer,

We are excited to (1)____ our newest product, the SmartBrew Coffee Maker. It connects to your phone, (2)____ you to schedule brewing times remotely. For a limited time, customers who order (3)____ May 31 will receive a free set of ceramic mugs. (4)____

Visit our website to place your order today.

questions.question: (4) Which sentence best fits this blank?
options: Our headquarters moved to a new building last year.
Supplies are limited, so don't miss this special offer.
The company was founded by two engineers in 2005.
Customer service is available every weekday.
questions.explanation: This sentence-insertion blank needs a sentence that reinforces urgency about the limited-time offer just mentioned.
questions.explanationVi: Chỗ trống dạng chèn câu cần một câu nhấn mạnh tính cấp bách của ưu đãi có giới hạn vừa nêu.

passages.label: Notice
passages.text:
NOTICE TO ALL TENANTS

The building's water supply will be shut off on Saturday, June 14, from 9 A.M. to 1 P.M. for scheduled pipe maintenance. Please store enough water in advance if needed. We recommend avoiding the use of washing machines and dishwashers during this time. The management office apologizes for any inconvenience and thanks you for your understanding.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the notice?
options: To inform tenants of a water shutoff
questions.explanation: The notice states "the building's water supply will be shut off", informing tenants of the shutoff.
questions.explanationVi: Thông báo nêu rõ "nguồn nước của tòa nhà sẽ bị cắt", nhằm báo cho cư dân biết trước.

passages.label: Notice
passages.text:
NOTICE TO ALL TENANTS

The building's water supply will be shut off on Saturday, June 14, from 9 A.M. to 1 P.M. for scheduled pipe maintenance. Please store enough water in advance if needed. We recommend avoiding the use of washing machines and dishwashers during this time. The management office apologizes for any inconvenience and thanks you for your understanding.

questions.question: How long will the water be shut off?
questions.explanation: From 9 A.M. to 1 P.M. is four hours.
questions.explanationVi: Từ 9 giờ sáng đến 1 giờ chiều là bốn tiếng đồng hồ.

passages.label: Notice
passages.text:
NOTICE TO ALL TENANTS

The building's water supply will be shut off on Saturday, June 14, from 9 A.M. to 1 P.M. for scheduled pipe maintenance. Please store enough water in advance if needed. We recommend avoiding the use of washing machines and dishwashers during this time. The management office apologizes for any inconvenience and thanks you for your understanding.

questions.question: What are tenants advised to avoid?
questions.explanation: The notice recommends "avoiding the use of washing machines and dishwashers".
questions.explanationVi: Thông báo khuyến nghị "tránh sử dụng máy giặt và máy rửa bát".

passages.label: Email 1 — From: Linh Nguyen
passages.text:
Subject: Order #4521 delay

Dear Customer Service,

I placed order #4521 two weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived. The tracking page hasn't updated in five days. Could you please check the status and let me know when I can expect delivery?

Thank you,
Linh Nguyen

passages.label: Email 2 — From: Customer Service
passages.text:
Subject: RE: Order #4521 delay

Dear Ms. Nguyen,

Thank you for reaching out, and we apologize for the delay. After checking with our shipping partner, we found that your package was held at customs. It has now been released and should arrive within 3 business days. As an apology, we have applied a 15% discount code (THANKS15) to your account for your next purchase.

Best regards,
Customer Service Team

questions.question: Why did Ms. Nguyen write the first email?
options: To ask about a delayed package
questions.explanation: Ms. Nguyen says her order "still hasn't arrived" and asks about its status.
questions.explanationVi: Cô Nguyen nói đơn hàng của mình "vẫn chưa đến" và hỏi về tình trạng đơn hàng.

passages.label: Email 1 — From: Linh Nguyen

passages.label: Advertisement
passages.text:
GREENLEAF CAFE — NOW HIRING

We are looking for a part-time Barista to join our team at our downtown location. Responsibilities include preparing beverages, operating the cash register, and keeping the counter area clean. Applicants must be available to work weekend mornings. Previous experience is preferred but not required — full training will be provided. Interested candidates should send their resume to jobs@greenleafcafe.example by June 20.

questions.question: What position is being advertised?
questions.explanation: The advertisement is for a "part-time Barista".
questions.explanationVi: Quảng cáo tuyển dụng vị trí "nhân viên pha chế bán thời gian".

passages.label: Advertisement
passages.text:

We are looking for a part-time Barista to join our team at our downtown location. Responsibilities include preparing beverages, operating the cash register, and keeping the counter area clean. Applicants must be available to work weekend mornings. Previous experience is preferred but not required — full training will be provided. Interested candidates should send their resume to jobs@greenleafcafe.example by June 20.

questions.question: What is required of applicants?
options: At least two years of experience
questions.explanation: The ad states applicants "must be available to work weekend mornings".
questions.explanationVi: Quảng cáo nêu rõ ứng viên "phải sẵn sàng làm việc vào sáng cuối tuần".

passages.label: Original Schedule
passages.text:
ANNUAL MARKETING CONFERENCE — DAY 2 SCHEDULE
9:00 A.M. — Keynote: "Digital Trends" by Ms. Alvarez
10:30 A.M. — Workshop: "Social Media Strategy"
1:00 P.M. — Panel Discussion: "Customer Loyalty"
3:00 P.M. — Closing remarks

passages.label: Email — From: Conference Organizer
passages.text:
Subject: Schedule Change for Day 2

Dear Attendees,

Please note that Ms. Alvarez's keynote speech has been moved from 9:00 A.M. to 11:00 A.M. due to a flight delay. The Social Media Strategy workshop will now begin at 9:00 A.M. instead. All other sessions remain unchanged. We apologize for any inconvenience.

Conference Organizing Team

passages.label: Text message — From: Priya (attendee)
passages.text: Hi team, just a heads-up — since the keynote moved, I'll join the workshop first and catch the keynote afterward. See you at the panel discussion at 1!

questions.question: Why was the keynote speech rescheduled?
options: The speaker had a flight delay
questions.explanation: The email explains the keynote moved "due to a flight delay".
questions.explanationVi: Email giải thích bài phát biểu chính được dời "do chuyến bay bị trễ".

speakingTasks.prompt: Read the following text aloud clearly and naturally.
speakingTasks.promptVi: Đọc to đoạn văn sau một cách rõ ràng và tự nhiên.
speakingTasks.script: Welcome to Riverside Mall. Our stores are open from nine in the morning until ten at night, seven days a week. Today, visit the second floor for our seasonal sale, with discounts of up to fifty percent on selected items. Don't forget to check our mobile app for exclusive coupons.

speakingTasks.prompt: Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.
speakingTasks.promptVi: Miêu tả bức tranh sau càng chi tiết càng tốt.
speakingTasks.imageDesc: A busy open-plan office: several employees are working at desks with computers, one person is presenting on a whiteboard to two colleagues, and there is a coffee machine in the corner.

speakingTasks.prompt: Do you prefer working from home or working in an office? Explain why.
speakingTasks.promptVi: Bạn thích làm việc tại nhà hay ở văn phòng hơn? Giải thích lý do.

speakingTasks.prompt: Read the following text aloud clearly and naturally.
speakingTasks.promptVi: Đọc to đoạn văn sau một cách rõ ràng và tự nhiên.
speakingTasks.script: Thank you for calling Sunrise Airlines. All of our representatives are currently helping other customers. Your call is important to us, and the estimated wait time is about five minutes. Please stay on the line, or visit our website to manage your booking online.

speakingTasks.prompt: What are the benefits of learning a foreign language for your career? Give your opinion.
speakingTasks.promptVi: Việc học một ngoại ngữ mang lại lợi ích gì cho sự nghiệp của bạn? Hãy nêu ý kiến của bạn.
